lever: use F64x4 vector accumulators inside the blocked KC GEMM macro-kernel

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf29-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64|matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf29-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

after_same_worker.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf29-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64|matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: Candidate kept the same pc, j, i, and ascending-l loop order. Each output lane received products in the same l order as the scalar array implementation; only four independent column accumulators were held in a SIMD vector.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: GEMM has no comparisons or tie-breaking.
isomorphism.floating_point: Candidate did not use fused multiply-add, mixed precision, or reassociation. Existing special-value, packed, threaded, large, and blocked bit-identity tests passed before rejection. Source was restored after the perf gate failed.

next_primitive: Do not retune blocked-KC scalar-vs-F64x4 accumulator shape. Attack a different GEMM primitive next: packed A panels plus a register-tiled macro-kernel that reduces C reload/store passes, or an autotuned MR/NR/KC family with an explicit bit-identity proof. Target >=1.2x on linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 and no downstream LU/Cholesky regression.
